title: Samhita Round Serving Acacia Wooden Tray with Handles for Serving Beverages Tea Plate Dessert Dinner Breakfast Plate (30.48cm x 30.48cm x 4.06cm)
features: The decorative organizer tray is made of Acacia Wood, elegant and modern, a great addition to any bar/ dining table or other party event.

With two support handles one at each side and, it is easy to place and handle items conveniently in this tray. Surrounding tray lips prevent food from falling over. Making it an attractive piece of home decor.
Great for serving tea, coffee, snacks, water, drinks and any food. Can be used both indoors and outdoors. Wooden serving tray for kitchen, dining, breakfast serving
Easy to clean and convenient to storage.
Size(CM): 30.48cm x 30.48cm x 4.06cm & Size(Inch): 12" x 12" x 1.6"
description: Our serving tray is made of durable natural Acacia Wood in a simple and generous style for any occasion. Our round serving tray offers a variety of practical and decorative purposes, it is ideally used to serve food and drink, sometimes this tray is used as a decorative tray to hold and organize small items. This simple and natural style can bring a decorative touch to any space.
